creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text: Note: https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/tree/llvm-17-update has been re-synced with main as of https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/884eeff20ce91ff9fd5cd0a1766e094dcb15b463, and contrib/llvm-project has been updated to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/tree/llvmorg-17.0.5 .
